title: Create lib/services/match-generator.ts with cosine similarity and scoring
summary: Created lib/services/match-generator.ts with cosine similarity, weighted scoring, match generation, batch processing, and blocked user exclusion
acceptance_criteria: File lib/services/match-generator.ts exists with TypeScript types
Implements calculateMatchScore() with weighted scoring (semantic, skills, interests, activity)
Implements generateMatchesForUser(userId, options) using Supabase service_role client
Implements generateBatchMatches(userIds, options) for admin batch processing
Writes to match_suggestions and match_scores tables
No Python worker references or fetch calls
Uses server Supabase client with service_role key
